entry.title: Domino's Expands Bread Bite Offerings
entry.summary:
Domino's extends its Bread Bites offerings beyond just Parmesan with the arrival of new Cinnamon and Garlic flavors.
Domino's Bread Bites features baked bite-sized pieces of "buttery-tasting" dough. Garlic Bread Bites are drizzled with garlic seasoning, while Cinnamon Bread Bites are tossed in cinnamon and sugar and served with a Sweet Icing dip cup. All three varieties of Domino's Bread Bites are available in 16- and 32-piece orders. 32-piece orders are included in the selection of Domino's long-running Mix & Match Deal, which offers two or more select menu items for $6.99 each (may vary). Photo via Domino's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Extra Value Meals are Back at McDonald's Starting September 8, 2025
entry.summary:
Extra Value Meals are back at McDonald's restaurants nationwide starting September 8, 2025. The discounted combo meals include options for all dayparts with eight regular offerings and two limited-time specials: the $5 Sausage McMuffin with Egg Extra Value Meal and the $8 Big Mac Extra Value Meal.
The $5 Sausage McMuffin with Egg meal includes a Sausage McMuffin, hash browns, and a small coffee, while the $8 Big Mac Extra Value Meal includes a Big Mac, medium fries, and a medium fountain drink. The regular Extra Value Meals lineup offers a 15% discount versus buying the listed items with fries and a drink separately and includes the following entree options:
Sausage McMuffin with Egg Sausage Egg & Cheese McGriddles Egg McMuffin Bacon, Egg and Cheese Biscuit Big Mac 10-piece Chicken McNuggets Any variety Quarter Pounder burger (Original, Bacon, or Deluxe) Any variety McCrispy Sandwich (Original, Deluxe, or Spicy Deluxe)
McDonald's also reveals two new, limited-time Extra Value Meals to come in November: the $5 Sausage, Egg and Cheese McGriddles meal and the $8 10-piece Chicken McNuggets meal. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Loaded Italian Sub Returns to Arby's
entry.summary:
The Loaded Italian Sub is making a limited-time return to Arby's and is described by the chain as "better than ever."
The Loaded Italian features thinly sliced ham, salami, and pepperoni served with Swiss cheese, banana peppers, lettuce, tomato, red onion, and garlic aioli on a toasted sub bun. Prices for the sandwich vary by location, but it costs $6.79 here in Los Angeles. Through September 28, 2025, Arby's Rewards members can redeem an offer for free large fries with the purchase of a Loaded Italian. Photo via Arby's. Nutritional Info - Arby's Loaded Italian Sub (281g) Calories - 600 Fat - 33g (Saturated Fat - 11g) Sodium - 2110mg Carbs - 46g (Sugar - 4g) Protein - 29g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Bakes New Oreo x Reese's Chocolate Peanut Butter Sandwich Cookie and More Through September 6, 2025
entry.summary:
Perhaps spurred by the new Oreo x Reese's collaboration, Crumbl debuts a new Oreo x Reese's Chocolate Peanut Butter Sandwich Cookie as part of this week's dessert menu running from September 1 through September 6, 2025.
Here's what you can expect to find at Crumbl this week: - Chocolate Peanut Butter Sandwich Cookie featuring Oreo x Reese's (pictured) - Two chilled cookies made with Oreo cookie pieces sandwiching a layer of creamy peanut butter filling mixed with Oreo cookie pieces and chopped Reese's Peanut Butter Cups. - Chocolate Covered Strawberry Cookie - A chilled chocolate cookies & cream cookie topped with fresh strawberry cream cheese frosting and a drizzle of semi-sweet chocolate. - Caramel Pumpkin Cake Cookie - A warm pumpkin cookie topped with caramel cream cheese frosting and a sprinkle of pumpkin cookie crumbs. - Sugar Cookie featuring Mother's Circus Animal - A warm sugar cookie embedded with rainbow sprinkles, topped with a layer of melty white drops, more rainbow sprinkles, and a Mother's Original Circus Animal Cookie. - Biscoff Ice Cream Cookie - A chilled brown sugar cookie topped with a buttercream made with Biscoff cookie butter and cookie crumbs. - Kentucky Butter Cake Cookie - A warm yellow butter cake cookie topped with a buttery glaze and a dusting of powdered sugar. - Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chunk Cookie - A warm cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Pizza Hut Adds New Crispy Chicken Pizzas
entry.summary:
Alongside its Crafted Flatzz, Pizza Hut has introduced two new Crispy Chicken Pizzas to the menu for a limited time: the Nashville Hot Chicken Pizza and the Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza.
Both pizzas feature new Crispy Chicken and come with a dipping cup of new Pickle Ranch or Ultimate Ranch. Pickle Ranch is a ranch sauce flavored with pickle spices, flavors, and herbs (it does not contain pickles), while Ultimate Ranch is a tangy buttermilk ranch sauce. The Nashville Hot Chicken Pizza features a base of Pickle Ranch and pizza cheese, topped with crispy chicken, onions, Nashville Hot seasoning, and a drizzle of Pickle Ranch. The Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza features a base of Ultimate Ranch and pizza cheese, topped with crispy chicken, bacon, and a drizzle of Ultimate Ranch. Both pizzas are available now at participating locations nationwide for a limited time through November 9, 2025. According to the fine print, the Crispy Chicken Pizzas are not available on Pan crust. You can get it on Tavern, Thin 'N Crispy, and Hand Tossed crusts. Prices vary, but a medium Crispy Chicken Pizza costs $16.99 near me in Los Angeles (a large is $2 more). Photo via Pizza Hut. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Papa Johns - Garlic 5-Cheese Crust Pizza
entry.summary:
Papa Johns' Garlic 5-Cheese Crust Pizza is a limited-time offer featuring a hand-tossed pizza ringed at the edge with garlic-parmesan sauce and an Italian 5-cheese blend (parmesan, romano, asiago, fontina, and provolone).
A large 1-topping Garlic 5-Cheese Crust Pizza costs $12.99 (it's $11.99 in most other states) near me, but I received this courtesy of Papa Johns. I chose sausage as my one topping.
The 5-cheese blend resulted in a thin, crispy shell that covered most of the crust's edge, which was nice, as Papa John's regular crust isn't usually crispy in my experience. It offered an enjoyable, toasty cheese flavor paired with garlic.
Papa Johns previously put out a similar crust called "Garlic Parmesan Crust." The Garlic 5-Cheese Crust was heavier on the toasty cheese, though.
On a side note, the pizzas I've gotten from Papa Johns are typically evenly browned on the bottom, but this particular pizza was very light on the bottom, even though the top was quite browned and there was leopard spotting on the cheese. I'm guessing something went wrong with the bake. Maybe a temperature issue at the bottom of the oven? The result was a softer crust than usual as well as a bit of gumminess.
Besides the baking issue, the Garlic 5-Cheese Crust made for good eating. The cheese and garlic brought welcome flavor and texture to the pizza. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: McDonald's Unveils New Special Edition Gold Sauce
entry.summary:
McDonald's introduces new Special Edition Gold Sauce, the chain's take on gold barbecue sauce, for a limtied time at participating locations nationwide starting Wednesaday, September 3, 2025.
McDonald's describes the new sauce as "a harmonious blend of vinegary North Carolina BBQ sauce infused with notes of honey, smoke and mustard." A gold barbecue sauce is a mustard-based barbecue sauce that originates from South Carolina. Special Edition Gold Sauce is meant to pair well with the chain's McCrispy chicken and is featured in three new menu items: - Special Edition Gold Snack Wrap - A McCrispy Strip, Special Edition Gold Sauce, shredded cheese, and shredded lettuce, wrapped in a soft flour tortilla. - Bacon Special Edition Gold McCrispy - A McCrispy chicken filet, Special Edition Gold Sauce, applewood-smoked bacon, and crinkle-cut pickles, served on a toasted potato roll. - Bacon Special Edition Gold Deluxe McCrispy - A McCrispy chicken filet, Special Edition Gold Sauce, applewood-smoked bacon, lettuce and tomato, served on a toasted potato roll. You can also get a dipping cup of the new sauce with an order of McCrispy Strips or Chicken McNuggets. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Captain D's Launches New Batter Dipped Shrimp
entry.summary:
Captain D's introduces new Batter Dipped Shrimp, which gives shrimp the same treatment as the chain's signature Batter Dipped Fish.
Available for a limited time now through October 26, 2025, the new fried shrimp offering is dipped in a savory and slightly seasoned batter that's made in-house each day. It's featured in the Batter Dipped Shrimp, Fish & Fries Meal, which includes four Batter Dipped Shrimp, a piece of Batter Dipped Fish, and fries or a classic side of your choice for $5.99 at participating locations. Batter Dipped Shrimp is also available as part of The Sampler, a Batter Dipped Duo Meal, and the Ultimate Seafood Platter. Photo via Captain D's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Denny's Changes Up Its "5 Slams Starting at $5" Lineup with New Grand Slam Burrito and More
entry.summary:
Denny's revamps its "5 Slams Starting at $5" menu to add three new dishes: the Grand Slam Burrito, BLT&E Slamwich, and 2-Egg Breakfast Slam. The menu is so-named because includes five Slams ranging from $5 to $10 (prices may vary).
Here's what you can expect from the 5 Slams Starting at $5 line-up: - New Grand Slam Burrito - Applewood-smoked bacon, sausage crumbles, scrambled eggs, hashbrowns and melted cheese, wrapped up in a warm flour tortilla and served with a side of salsa. - New BLT&E Slamwich - Four strips of applewood-smoked bacon, a cooked-to-order egg, lettuce, tomato, and mayo on toasted sourdough. The sandwich is served with a side of hash browns or fries. - New 2-Egg Breakfast Slam - Two eggs served with hash browns and toast. - Everyday Value Slam - Two buttermilk pancakes or two slices of French toast served with two eggs and hash browns. - Super Slam - Tow buttermilk pancakes, two eggs, two strips of applewood-smoked bacon, two sausage links, and hash browns. The new lineup is available now through October 28, 2025 at participating Denny's restaurants nationwide. Photo via Denny's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Popeyes Updates Wings with Milder Base and New Flavors
entry.summary:
Popeyes updates its bone-in wings to swap its spicy Ghost Pepper Wings with a mild marinated base that features "a savory blend of Louisiana seasonings." Ghost Pepper is now available as a new dry rub.
The new wing lineup includes three sauce flavors (Signature Hot, Sweet 'N Spicy, and Honey BBQ) and four new dry rubs (the previously mentioned Ghost Pepper plus Lemon Pepper, Garlic Parm, and Buffalo). Here's what you can expect from each flavor: - Signature Hot - Cajun hot sauce with a hint of sweetness. - Sweet 'N Spicy - A glaze featuring chili, garlic, and ginger. - Honey BBQ - A bold, rich, and tangy Honey BBQ sauce. - New Ghost Pepper Dry Rub - A savory blend of classic Louisiana seasonings and Ghost Pepper. - New Lemon Pepper Dry Rub - A sweet and tangy lemon pepper seasoning. - New Garlic Parm Dry Rub - A savory blend of parmesan cheese and garlic. - New Buffalo Dry Rub - "Classic buffalo flavor coats a crisp wing to create the perfect mix of flavor and heat." Popeyes' wing prices start at $5.99 for six. To promote the wing changes, Popeyes has partnered with NFL quarterback Baker Mayfield to offer a new, limited-time deal: Starting September 4, the Monday after Baker Mayfield scores a touchdown in an NFL game this season, Popeyes reward members can get a free 6-piece wings with any $10+ digital order made via the Popeyes app or website. The promotion runs through January 4, 2026. Photo via Popeyes. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Burger King Debuts New Crispy Onion Whopper; Brings Back Cini Minis
entry.summary:
Burger King launches the new Crispy Onion Whopper as the latest burger spurred by its "Whopper by You" platform. The chain also brings back Cini Minis for a limited time.
The Crispy Onion Whopper features a quarter-pound, flame-grilled beef patty served with lettuce, tomato, mayo, American cheese, bacon, pickles, breaded onion rings, fried onion crisps, and BBQ sauce on a toasted sesame seed bun. For smaller appetites, it can also be ordered as a Whopper Jr. Cini Minis are bite-sized cinnamon rolls served with a sweet icing dipping sauce. You get four in an order. Prices vary, but a Crispy Onion Whopper is $7.99 in Los Angeles, while the Whopper Jr. version is $4.79. An order of Cini Minis is $2.49 here. Burger King's "Whopper by You" platform solicits fan creations for potential new Whopper varieties. Photo via Burger King. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Haagen-Dazs Reveals 2025 Pumpkin Spice Menu
entry.summary:
Haagen-Dazs reveals its 2025 Pumpkin Spice Collection for this fall, arriving September 2, 2025, at the brand's ice cream shops nationwide.
This year's seasonal pumpkin spice offerings include: - Pumpkin Spice Shake - Dulce de Leche ice cream blended with pumpkin puree, topped with whipped cream and a dusting of pumpkin pie spices. - Pumpkin Spice Dazzler - Dulce de Leche ice cream layered with caramel sauce and crunchy cinnamon cookie pieces, sprinkled on top with warm pumpkin pie spices. - New Pumpkin Spice Dipped Waffle Cone - A Pumpkin Spice Waffle Cone dipped in white chocolaty chips and rolled in cinnamon cookies and pumpkin pie spices. It comes filled with your choice of ice cream. Photo via Haagen-Daz. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Taco Bell - Cheesy Melty Grilled Steak Burrito
entry.summary:
Taco Bell's Cheesy Melty Grilled Steak Burrito is a value-priced offering featuring marinated grilled steak, seasoned rice, a three-cheese blend (mozzarella, cheddar, and pepper jack), reduced-fat sour cream, and Creamy Jalapeno Sauce, wrapped up in a soft flour tortilla.
I bought one for $3.29. The burrito had a nice heft to it. It was nicely folded and tightly rolled. There was an even, though somewhat sparse, distribution of mildly seasoned steak inside. Unfortunately, the distribution of the sour cream and Creamy Jalapeno Sauce was not so even. My initial bites of the burrito were full of sour cream, while the Creamy Jalapeno Sauce was gathered at the other end. So I was mostly tasting one sauce or the other in many bites. There's a mild heat from the Creamy Jalapeno Sauce to go with a jalapeno-inflected mayo base.
The second flavor driver of the burrito was the seasoned rice, which had a nice flavor, but I would have liked a bit more presence from the steak. The cheeses provided a nice melt and stretch, but didn't make much of a showing in the taste department. Although it features in the name, there wasn't a whole lot of cheese to go around.
Overall, Taco Bell's Cheesy Melty Grilled Steak Burrito made for a filling meal for an affordable price. Flavor-wise, it was overly familiar and light on steak. If we were being more honest with names, it would be the "Saucy Rice Flecked with Steak Burrito." Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Cheesy Melty Grilled Steak Burrito Calories - 500 Fat - 23g (Saturated Fat - 10g) Sodium - 1160mg Carbs - 49g (Sugar - 4g) Protein - 21g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Domino's Brings Back "Any Pizza with Any Toppings for $9.99 Each" Deal
entry.summary:
Heading into the fall, Domino's "Best Deal Ever" is back for a limited time. The promotion lets you buy "any pizza with any toppings" for $9.99 each (as long as it's not a Parmesan Stuffed Crust because that will cost you extra) at participating locations nationwide.
The $9.99 deal lets you choose from Hand Tossed, Handmade Pan, New York Style, Gluten Free, and Crunchy Thin Crust to go with various sauces and toppings. The deal is available online only through the Domino's website or mobile app. It specifically excludes extra-large and specialty pizzas. According to the fine print, the maximum number of toppings for "any toppings" is seven (six if you're opting for a Handmade Pan or New York Style crust). The deal is available for delivery or carryout, although there is a minimum purchase requirement for delivery that varies by location. Photo via Domino's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Tequila Lime Chicken Returns to Moe's Southwest Grill
entry.summary:
Tequila Lime Chicken is back at Moe's Southwest Grill for a limited time and gets a tangy twist in the form of a sprinkle of Tajin chili-lime seasoning. The Queso Crunch Taco is also back.
Tequila Lime Chicken was Moe's most popular limited-time offering last year and features white-meat chicken tossed in agave sauce with a smoky blend of lime, jalapeno, and garlic--now topped with a dash of Tajin. Tajin is also available to add to any entree with no extra charge. Moe's Queso Crunch Taco is a crunchy taco shell wrapped in a soft tortilla with a layer of queso in between them. The shell is filled with Tequila Lime Chicken, Oaxaca cheese, pico de gallo, poblano crema, and Tajin. As a promotion for its return, Moe Rewards Members can get a free Queso Crunch Taco with the purchase of any entree through September 7, 2025, at participating locations chain-wide. Photo via Moe's Southwest Grill. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.summary:
Dunkin' debuts its new Cereal N' Milk Latte as part of its 2025 fall menu, which also includes the Mixed Berry Daydream Refresher, a familiar slate of pumpkin items, and more.
The new Cereal N’ Milk Latte features a blend of espresso and cereal milk for a nostalgic marshmallow-cereal flavor. It's available hot or iced. entry.title: Sonic Launches New Salted Caramel Toffee Iced Coffee and Croissant Bites
entry.summary:
Sonic is taking a different approach from pumpkin flavors for the fall 2025 season by introducing a new Salted Caramel Toffee Iced Coffee and Salted Caramel Croissant Bites.
The Salted Caramel Toffee Iced Coffee features iced cold brew coffee blended with salted caramel and buttery toffee, topped with cold foam and crunchy salted toffee pieces. The 20-ounce size is priced at a suggested $2.99. The new Salted Caramel Croissant Bites are flaky, bite-sized pastries dusted with a caramel sugar blend. An order comes with four Bites for $1.99 (price may vary) and is part of Sonic's $1.99 Menu. Both the Salted Caramel Toffee Iced Coffee and Croissant Bites are available exclusively through the Sonic App now, with a national launch planned for September 1, 2025. Photo via Sonic.

entry.title: Little Caesars Offers Two Large 1-Topping Pizzas for $4.99 Each
entry.summary:
Little Caesars is running a limited-time, online-only deal where you can get two large 1-topping pizzas for $4.99 each ($9.98 total) at participating locations nationwide.
The deal is available when ordering through the Little Caesars website or mobile app using the code "PIZZAPIZZA" through September 14, 2025. The pricing is similar to the limited-time "More for $9.99" value menu that Little Caesars recently offered over the summer, but lets you choose from a wider selection of toppings. The deal is slightly higher at $5.99 a pizza in some areas (including here in Los Angeles). The higher price also includes a slightly different code to input: "PIZZAPIZZA1". A custom 1-topping pizza normally costs $8.49 here (that makes for a discount of $2.50 per pizza). Photo via Little Caesars. Read more at Brand Eating!
